hero.subtitle: Upload or scan your skin image and receive instant AI-powered predictions, disease information, and expert precautions.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for AI-powered skin disease detection in one platform.

aiPrediction.title: AI Prediction
aiPrediction.description: CNN model trained on HAM10000 dataset detects 7 types of skin diseases with high accuracy.

webcam.title: Live Webcam Detection
webcam.description: Use your device camera to capture and analyze skin images in real time.

awareness.title: Disease Awareness
awareness.description: Detailed information about symptoms, causes, severity, and prevention for each disease.

gradcam.title: Grad-CAM Visualization
gradcam.description: See exactly where the AI focused on your image using heatmap overlays.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: Available in English, Hindi, Malayalam, Tamil and many more languages for wider accessibility.

secure.title: Secure User Profiles
secure.description: Your data is protected with Firebase authentication and secure cloud storage.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get your AI skin analysis in 3 simple steps — no medical knowledge required.

step1.title: Upload or Scan Image
step1.description: Drag and drop a skin image or use your live webcam to capture one directly.

step2.title: AI Analyzes Image
step2.description: Our CNN model processes the image and runs it through the HAM10000 trained model.

step3.title: Get Results & Precautions
step3.description: Receive the predicted disease, confidence score, Grad-CAM heatmap, and precautions.

awareness.disclaimerBody: AI predictions are not a replacement for professional medical diagnosis. This tool is meant for awareness and early detection only. Always consult a certified dermatologist for proper diagnosis and treatment.
awareness.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of users using AI to stay aware of their skin health.

footer.copyright: © 2025 DermaLens. For awareness purposes only. Not a substitute for medical advice.

errors.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number.
